MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian, Bailiff: Henry. Jerry Hauser, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Janice Lee. William E. Weiss was sworn and examined for the plaintiff. The Court receives evdence and grants judgment as follows: Principal: $350,000.00; Attorney fees and costs in the sum of $29,121.51 for a total judgment of $379,121.50. Plaintiff shall recover from Defendants $100,000.00 in punitive damages. Judgment signed.
